description: A meta-application that allows users to pick 3 religions and generates a custom 'The Religare' instance populated with their data, then deploys it to Vercel.

stories.title: Selection UI & Landing Page
stories.description: Create a high-fidelity landing page with a 3-slot selection interface using the original Religare aesthetic (Glassmorphism, dark mode, Inter font). Users can search or pick from a list.
acceptance: Landing page renders correctly with 'Relegare Maker' branding.
Three selection slots are visible and interactive.
Selection state is managed (picking a religion updates the slot).

stories.title: Religious Database (JSON)
stories.description: Develop a comprehensive JSON database of at least 8 major religions (Catholicism, Zoroastrianism, Islam, Buddhism, Hinduism, Judaism, Shinto, Sikhism) with all 11 Religare fields + Practicum sections.
acceptance: JSON file exists with structured data for 8+ religions.
Each entry contains: Time & Place, Founder, Sacred Text, Origin Culture, Creation Myth, Core Beliefs, Functional Purpose, Power Structure, Religious Lineage, Relevance & Legacy, and Practicum (I-V).

stories.title: Template Engine & Preview
stories.description: Create a client-side generator that injects selected religion data into a master 'The Religare' template (HTML/CSS/JS constants). Add a 'Live Preview' mode.
acceptance: Generator successfully replaces placeholders with JSON data.
Preview accurately reflects the look and feel of the original app.
All 3 selected religions are navigable in the preview.

stories.title: Vercel Deployment Automation
stories.description: Implement a 'Deploy to Vercel' feature. This will bundle the generated HTML/CSS/JS into a temporary directory and use the Vercel CLI to deploy a new project.
acceptance: Button 'GENERATE & DEPLOY' triggers the build process.
Generator creates a standalone project folder.
Vercel CLI command is executed to deploy the project.
User receives a success message with the live URL.

stories.title: Final QA & Performance
stories.description: Audit the generated apps for tag closure, JS errors, and responsiveness. Ensure the 'Maker' interface itself is premium and stunning.
acceptance: All generated apps pass a basic smoke test (navigation works).
Maker UI is optimized for mobile and desktop.
Starfield and animations are consistent with the original brand.
